subcodes.first_line: I testify, O my God, that Thou art God; there is none other God but Thee. From time immemorial Thou hast been standing, present, observant and speaking [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی انک انت الله لا اله الا انت لم تزل کنت قائما حاضرا ناظرا ناطقا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
